choices.title: Oh look, a stranger, what brings you here?

choice.title: I was sent to deliver a crossbow to you.
choice.response: Oh alright, you can keep it.

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: What?
choice.response: I just wanted someone to clear out the crabs...

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: Okay.
choice.response: So, instead of hiring a bunch of cleaners...

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: I ordered a cheap crossbow with free shipping...

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: Wow.
choice.response: Knowing that the delivery guy must clear them out...

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: Smart.
choice.response: And if the delivery guy happens to die...

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: That would be me.
choice.response: There's money back guarantee, ha ha ha.

choices.title: STR_NAME said you can keep the crossbow.

choice.title: That's the spirit. Ends justify the means.
choice.response: I like you, now let me show you something.

choice.title: Eeew, that's evil. You evil person.

choices.title: STR_NAME wanted to show you something.

choice.title: What's that?
choice.response: I can teach you how to use crossbows effectively.

choice.title: Nah, not interested. I'll be leaving now. (Travel)
All I want is what you're wearing.
I think I'll be leaving now. (Travel)
choice.response: Don't let the door hit you on your way out.

choice.title: Actually, I want you to die!
